name: Notice.AAA6.ClaimantIntent.ClaimSettled.Claimant
descriptionEn:
You have confirmed that the claim against ${respondent1PartyName} was settled on ${claimSettledDateEn}.

The defendant has 19 days from the date of settlement to notify the court of any objection.
descriptionCy:
Rydych wedi cadarnhau bod yr hawliad yn erbyn ${respondent1PartyName} wedi'i setlo ar ${claimSettledDateCy}.

Mae gan y diffynnydd 19 diwrnod o ddyddiad y setliad i hysbysu'r llys am unrhyw wrthwynebiad.
